title: Dynamic Method Dispatch in Java: Runtime Polymorphism
description: A flowchart demonstrating how the Java Virtual Machine (JVM) determines which version of an overridden method to execute at runtime based on the actual object type, not the reference variable type.
relationships: The Reference Variable points to the Actual Object
A method is called on the Reference Variable
The JVM checks the actual object's type at runtime
The JVM executes the method defined in the object's class (Subclass Method)
If not overridden, the JVM executes the method from the parent class (Superclass Method)
